description_en: Designed the reinforced concrete structural system for a 3-story office building, including foundation, columns, beams, and slab analysis using SAP2000.
description_id: Merancang sistem struktur beton bertulang untuk gedung kantor 3 lantai, meliputi pondasi, kolom, balok, dan analisis pelat lantai menggunakan SAP2000.

description_en: Supervised the widening of a 40-meter concrete girder bridge, coordinating field execution with the structural drawings and quality control.
description_id: Mengawasi pelebaran jembatan girder beton sepanjang 40 meter, mengoordinasikan pelaksanaan lapangan dengan gambar struktur dan pengendalian mutu.

description_en: Prepared site layout, drainage planning, and cost estimation (RAB) for a 50-unit residential housing cluster.
description_id: Menyusun tata letak lahan, perencanaan drainase, dan estimasi biaya (RAB) untuk klaster perumahan 50 unit.
